scope.notes: ENTITY ONLY. Prepared with local deterministic inspection only; no generated canonical outputs or override files were edited.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global entity: both records identify MTA Construction and Development / MTA Construction & Development, with acronym MTA C&D. The alias is the annual-report instance and the target is the broader MTA C&D entity record.

Same global entity: both records identify MTA Construction and Development / MTA Construction & Development. The alias is a one-source meeting-document instance and the target is the broader MTA C&D entity record.

Same global entity: both records identify MTA Construction and Development. The alias source quote states MTA Construction and Development Company is called MTA Construction and Development, matching the target.

Same global entity: both records identify MTA Construction and Development / MTA C&D. The alias source evidence uses the MTA C&D acronym and the target expands that acronym to MTA Construction and Development.

record_existence_and_kind.command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, e.entity_name, e.entity_type, e.short_name, e.acronym, r.primary_source_id from records r join entities e using(record_id) where r.record_id in ('entity_mta-construction-and-development','entity_annual-report-2021-mtacd','entity_meeting-doc-127471-mta-cd','entity_meeting-doc-129106-mta-cd','entity_meeting-doc-199136-cd','entity_meeting-doc-29956-mtacd','entity_meeting-doc-37086-mta-cd','entity_meeting-doc-39661-mtacd','entity_mta-c-and-d-meeting-doc-131666','entity_mta-cd-meeting-doc-102786','entity_mta-construction-development-186841') order by r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.result_summary: 11/11 selected alias and target records exist; every selected record has record_kind=entity. Names consistently identify MTA Construction and Development / MTA Construction & Development / MTA C&D.

existing_alias_conflicts.merges_json_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in data/identity-overrides/merges.json
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where kind='entity' and alias in ('entity_annual-report-2021-mtacd','entity_meeting-doc-127471-mta-cd','entity_meeting-doc-129106-mta-cd','entity_meeting-doc-199136-cd','entity_meeting-doc-29956-mtacd','entity_meeting-doc-37086-mta-cd','entity_meeting-doc-39661-mtacd','entity_mta-c-and-d-meeting-doc-131666','entity_mta-cd-meeting-doc-102786','entity_mta-construction-development-186841');"
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in canonical identity_aliases

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(alias,target) as (values ('entity_annual-report-2021-mtacd','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_meeting-doc-127471-mta-cd','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_meeting-doc-129106-mta-cd','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_meeting-doc-199136-cd','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_meeting-doc-29956-mtacd','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_meeting-doc-37086-mta-cd','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_meeting-doc-39661-mtacd','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_mta-c-and-d-meeting-doc-131666','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_mta-cd-meeting-doc-102786','entity_mta-construction-and-development'),('entity_mta-construction-development-186841','entity_mta-construction-and-development')) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind='entity' and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.db_result: no output; no selected pair is present in canonical do_not_merge
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r '.pairs.entity[]? | select((.record_ids | index("entity_mta-construction-and-development")) and (.record_ids | index("entity_annual-report-2021-mtacd") or index("entity_meeting-doc-127471-mta-cd") or index("entity_meeting-doc-129106-mta-cd") or index("entity_meeting-doc-199136-cd") or index("entity_meeting-doc-29956-mtacd") or index("entity_meeting-doc-37086-mta-cd") or index("entity_meeting-doc-39661-mtacd") or index("entity_mta-c-and-d-meeting-doc-131666") or index("entity_mta-cd-meeting-doc-102786") or index("entity_mta-construction-development-186841"))) | .record_ids | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_result: no output; no selected pair is present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity105.command: for f in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch10[0-5]-prep.json; do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="entity") | select(.alias_id as $a | ["entity_annual-report-2021-mtacd","entity_meeting-doc-127471-mta-cd","entity_meeting-doc-129106-mta-cd","entity_meeting-doc-199136-cd","entity_meeting-doc-29956-mtacd","entity_meeting-doc-37086-mta-cd","entity_meeting-doc-39661-mtacd","entity_mta-c-and-d-meeting-doc-131666","entity_mta-cd-meeting-doc-102786","entity_mta-construction-development-186841"] | index($a)) | [$f,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity105.result: no output; none of the proposed entity aliases appear in prior codex identity prep artifacts through batch105

source_evidence_spot_check.result_summary: Selected records have entity evidence refs naming MTA Construction and Development / MTA Construction & Development / MTA C&D. Source quotes for meeting_doc_39661 and meeting_doc_131666 explicitly say MTA Construction and Development Company is called MTA Construction and Development.

forbidden_command_compliance.result: No external/provider-backed commands or profiles/providers were used. Did not run canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: pwd, rg, git status, sqlite3 data/canonical.db, jq, sed/head, test, wc, and date; the only file edit was adding this prep artifact.
